story_summary: This replay represents 45 days of experience on RELIANCE. During this period, DP generated 45 experiences, evolved 27 theories, extracted 5 lessons, consolidated them into 0 active principles, maintained 1 evolving world model(s), and reduced uncertainty in 3 key market mechanisms while identifying 27 unresolved evidence gap(s).

timeline.theory: Regime is driven by Liquidity Absorption; price remains range-bound despite volume expansion.
